name: io.github.localstack/localstack-mcp-server
description: A LocalStack MCP Server providing essential tools for local cloud development & testing

environment_variables.description: LocalStack Auth Token (required for all LocalStack MCP tools)
environment_variables.name: LOCALSTACK_AUTH_TOKEN

environment_variables.description: Source AWS access key used by AWS Replicator to read external AWS resources
environment_variables.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID

environment_variables.description: Source AWS secret access key used by AWS Replicator to read external AWS resources
environment_variables.name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY

environment_variables.description: Optional source AWS session token used by AWS Replicator for temporary credentials
environment_variables.name: AWS_SESSION_TOKEN

environment_variables.description: Source AWS region used by AWS Replicator
environment_variables.name: AWS_DEFAULT_REGION

environment_variables.description: Optional Replicator-specific source AWS access key. Use this instead of AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID when the Replicator source account should be isolated from generic AWS config.
environment_variables.name: AWS_REPLICATOR_SOURCE_AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID

environment_variables.description: Optional Replicator-specific source AWS secret access key. Use with AWS_REPLICATOR_SOURCE_AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.
environment_variables.name: AWS_REPLICATOR_SOURCE_AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY

environment_variables.description: Optional Replicator-specific source AWS session token for temporary credentials.
environment_variables.name: AWS_REPLICATOR_SOURCE_AWS_SESSION_TOKEN

environment_variables.description: Optional Replicator-specific source AWS region. Use with the AWS_REPLICATOR_SOURCE_* credential group.
environment_variables.name: AWS_REPLICATOR_SOURCE_REGION_NAME

environment_variables.description: Optional Replicator-specific source AWS endpoint URL for advanced source-account scenarios.
environment_variables.name: AWS_REPLICATOR_SOURCE_ENDPOINT_URL

environment_variables.description: Set to 1 in the LocalStack container environment to enable App Inspector by default across restarts. The MCP tool can also toggle App Inspector at runtime.
environment_variables.name: APP_INSPECTOR
